items.h: Backstage Report On Mick Foley's AEW Schedule, Forbidden Door Status
items.p: Mick Foley might be "All Elite," but his own personal schedule will prevent him from appearing at AEW x NJPW Forbidden Door 2026.

items.h: Claudio Castagnoli Thinks AEW Will Be Able To Make A 'Permanent Climb' In Popularity
items.p: Claudio Castagnoli is confident that AEW can continue to grow following its recent upswing, and recently explained the reasons behind that growth.
